name: yeeflow-builder
description: Private Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills.

interface.shortDescription: Private Yeeflow application-building skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Private Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, inspecting and validating .yapk existing-application version packages, applying schema-backed YAPK Resource decode guidance, preserving signing/resource proof boundaries, generating forms, lists, dashboards, Pivot Table analytics controls, Container/Button action navigation, expressions, workflows, document-library patterns, and custom code controls, orchestrating runtime tests, validating package materialization, generated data-list seed/add-readiness, action target readiness, approval request-page publish readiness, safely checking read-only Yeeflow directory API connectivity from local environment variables, and managing private plugin releases.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Yeeflow app from these requirements.
Validate this Yeeflow package before runtime testing.
Plan a Yeeflow runtime test pass.
Run the safe Yeeflow directory API connectivity smoke test.
Update the Yeeflow Builder Plugin release.
What YAPK support is included in v0.5.22?
